name: Dan Aykroyd
abstract: Daniel Edward Aykroyd (  AK-royd; born July 1, 1952) is a Canadian and American actor, comedian, screenwriter, and producer. Aykroyd was a writer and an original member of the "Not Ready for Prime Time Players" cast on the NBC sketch comedy series Saturday Night Live from its inception in 1975 until his departure in 1979.

concerts.label: Rainforest Foundation Benefit Concert
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Jack DeJohnette
about_quotes.evidence: We also had Joe Morton, who was one of the new Blues Brother, John Goodman and Dan Aykroyd. It was filmed up in Canada, in Toronto. When everybody found out who was in this band they said, “Oh, yeah, I’m there!”
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack DeJohnette — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
